root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as memname ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no,0,1) as member_address_1 ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no,0,2) as member_address_2 ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no,0,3) as member_address_3 ,pka_com_function.fp_get_province_name(sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code) as province_name ,trim('*' from sc_mem_m_member_address.postcode) as postcode ,substr(trim('*' from sc_mem_m_member_address.postcode),1,1)as postcode1 ,substr(trim('*' from sc_mem_m_member_address.postcode),2,1)as postcode2 ,substr(trim('*' from sc_mem_m_member_address.postcode),3,1)as postcode3 ,substr(trim('*' from sc_mem_m_member_address.postcode),4,1)as postcode4 ,substr(trim('*' from sc_mem_m_member_address.postcode),5,1)as postcode5
from sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_member_address
where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code <> '3' and sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type = '0'
/*WHERE*/
